item.title: Fallen tree branches partly blocking the pavement, 13th June
item.description:
Branches have fallen from the tree and are partly blocking the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Kennel Hill, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large storage vehicle on permit road, 13th June
item.description:
There is a storage vehicle next to a van that never moves and we all pay for spaces and it is using up space that should be used for paid vehicles. It is a permanent fixture on the road and never moves. It is outside numbers 16, 18, 20 and 22 Dalkeith Road, SE21 8LS. This vehicle has never moved since permit restrictions came into place and it means during busy times they are using a space which could be used by permit holders.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10,12, Dalkeith Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A piece of the curb missing, 13th June
item.description:
Hello, I would like to report a damaged section of curb on my street. As shown in the attached photo, a piece of the curb is missing, leaving a gap between the remaining curb sections. This creates a potential hazard for pedestrians, cyclists, and vehicles, and may also contribute to erosion and drainage issues. Could you please arrange for an inspection and repair of this missing curb section at your earliest convenience?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willessen Lane - Playground, 13th June
item.description:
Swing broken

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lincoln Mews, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two potholes, 13th June
item.description:
There are potnoles in the middle of the zebra crossing which could easily cause a serious trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 387, Hurst Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 84 iverson road, 13th June
item.description:
Tremors go through our house over 100 times a day and rock the whole building. This started after the really heavy trucks started driving through iverson to get to the construction site on Maygrove Road. I have reported this before and received a notification that it has been fixed but it has not. Reference number of previous log- 8906198
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82-104, Iverson Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter covered st, 13th June
item.description:
Bellefields road covered in litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellefields Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bins spilling rubbish into street, 13th June
item.description:
Reported multiple times. x4 bins outside 30 and 32 Bellefields rd have no lids. When full litter falls out of them littering street. Please replace to keep street clean from litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellefields Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car had rolled into road creating dangerous obstruction near junction, 13th June
item.description:
Car had rolled into road creating dangerous obstruction near junction. It has hit another car and it looks like the car is the only thing stopping it rolling dangerously down the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Minchenden Crescent, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet
